title: Disposition of proceeds of fees
doc_html:
§721.  Disposition of proceeds of fees

All money collected by the board under the provisions of this Part shall be devoted to the inspection of bottling plants throughout the state and to the enforcement of this Part.
doc_text:
§721.  Disposition of proceeds of fees
All money collected by the board under the provisions of this Part shall be devoted to the inspection of bottling plants throughout the state and to the enforcement of this Part.
